subject: Jirachi — small star-shaped mythical Pokemon floating before a full moon at night
description: A small, round-headed mythical Pokemon with a compact body, two large pointed ear-tufts or horn projections on either side of its head, and two long flowing ribbon-like streamers trailing below its body. The figure is pale yellow and white, floating in front of a large full moon that dominates the blue-grey night sky. Stars are faintly visible in the background. The creature's eyes appear closed or nearly closed, consistent with a sleeping or serene expression. The holo treatment adds shimmer to the background sky.
foreground: small star-shaped mythical Pokemon with pointed ear-tufts and flowing ribbon streamers, floating
background: large full moon against dark blue-grey night sky with faint stars
emotion: serene, sleeping, peaceful — eyes closed or nearly closed
